PowerShell($f = 'evaluation_results\\hotpotqa_qwen2-1.5b_20260520_001355.jsonl'; $rows = Get-Content $f | ForEach-Object { $_ | ConvertFrom-Json }; $sf = \($rows | Measure-Object -Property sf_f1 -Average\).Average; $recall = \($rows | Measure-Object -Property retrieval_recall -Average\).Average; $all_gold = \($rows | Where-Object { $_.all_gold_retrieved } | Measure-Object\).Count; "n=$\($rows.Count\)`nMean SF-F1: $\([math]::Round\($sf, 4\)\)`nMean retrieval recall: $\([math]::Round\($recall, 4\)\)`nall_gold_retrieved: $all_gold / $\($rows.Count\) = $\([math]::Round\($all_gold / $rows.Count, 4\)\)`n---Rows---"; $rows | Format-Table question_id, exact_match, f1_score, sf_f1, retrieval_recall, all_gold_retrieved, time_ms -AutoSize | Out-String -Width 200)
